common.ogImageAlt: GridGen — a labeled coordinate grid laid over an image, exported as a PDF

home.title: GridGen — Add a Coordinate Grid to Any Image & Export as PDF
home.description: Free browser tool to overlay a labeled coordinate grid on any photo or map and export it as a print-ready PDF. No signup, runs entirely in your browser.
home.keywords: grid overlay, grid on image, grid drawing method, image to grid PDF, coordinate grid generator, add grid to map, battle map grid, reference grid photo

wikiHow.title: How GridGen Works — User Guide & Wiki
wikiHow.description: A complete guide to GridGen: how to upload an image, configure a coordinate grid, customize its appearance, add chess or numeric labels, and export a print-ready PDF.

wikiTech.title: GridGen Technical Reference — Stack & Architecture
wikiTech.description: How GridGen is built: a zero-dependency vanilla JavaScript app that renders a coordinate grid on an HTML5 Canvas and exports to PDF with jsPDF.

mapGrid.title: Add a Coordinate Grid to a Map & Export as PDF — GridGen
mapGrid.description: Lay a coordinate reference grid over a map image and export a print-ready PDF — useful for orienteering, scouting, and field reference. A visual grid overlay, not a georeferenced map generator.
mapGrid.keywords: add coordinate grid to map, overlay grid on map pdf, topographic map grid overlay, orienteering map grid, reference grid on map image, military-style map grid, print map with grid

featureList: Grid by number of cells or by cell size in pixels
Customizable line color, thickness, and opacity
PDF export at full image resolution

wikiHow.howtoName: How to add a coordinate grid to an image and export it as a PDF with GridGen

steps.name: Upload an image
steps.text: Drag and drop or click to select a PNG, JPG, or WEBP image.

steps.name: Choose a grid mode
steps.text: Define the grid by number of cells or by cell size in pixels.

steps.name: Customize appearance
steps.text: Set the line color, thickness, and opacity for readability.

steps.name: Add coordinate labels
steps.text: Pick chess or numeric labels, inside or outside placement, and the origin corner.

steps.name: Export the PDF
steps.text: Click Download PDF to save an A4 file at full image resolution.

mapGrid.howtoName: How to add a coordinate grid to a map and export it as a PDF

steps.name: Get a base map
steps.text: Use a map image you already have — a screenshot, a scan, or an exported topographic map.

steps.name: Upload it to GridGen
steps.text: Drag the map into the preview area or click to select it.

steps.name: Set the grid
steps.text: Choose the number of squares or a fixed cell size to match the reference grid you need.

steps.name: Add coordinate labels
steps.text: Turn on chess (A1) or numeric (1,1) labels so every square has a reference.

steps.name: Export as PDF
steps.text: Download a print-ready PDF to take into the field.
